---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new diagnostic check or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?
Describe the Windows network issue this new check would detect or fix.

## Proposed Check / Feature
What should NetFixer detect? How should it fix it?

## How common is this problem?
Is this something many Windows users face? Link any forum threads or Stack Overflow posts if you have them.

## Technical Approach (optional)
If you know how to detect/fix it (PowerShell command, registry key, Win32 API), share it here.
